{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Visiri fleet
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Visiri fleet]] was in a stalemate with [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c37">''The Knight'', chapter 37</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Visiria]]'s fleet consists of crimson-striped ships.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18">''The Pilot'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
